overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking across a sunny tropical beach. The character moves from a position near modern resort hotels toward a pier extending into the ocean, with clear blue skies and turquoise water visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical resort beach with hotel buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach with resort buildings visible to the right side

entered.detail: large multi-story building with green-tinted glass windows and white structural elements
turquoise blue sea meeting the horizon under scattered clouds
elevated building or pier extending over the water on stilts
light-colored sandy beach surface covering the ground
green trees and shrubs lining the edge of the beach near the hotel

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an empty tropical beach on a bright sunny day. To the right, a modern glass resort hotel rises behind a line of tropical vegetation, while the turquoise ocean stretches out to the left. In the distance ahead, a pier structure extends over the water.

events.description: character turns left to face the ocean and begins walking toward the pier structure

agents.ego_description: turning toward the ocean and walking directly toward the distant pier structure

entered.detail: small dark vessel visible on the horizon line of the ocean

segments.scene_description: After turning left, the character now faces the ocean and walks toward the pier. The resort buildings fall away to the right and exit the frame, leaving an open view of the sea. The pier grows larger in the center of the frame as the character approaches, and a distant cargo ship appears on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a tropical coastline that shifts from a view of luxury architecture to an open expanse of ocean. It begins with the character walking along an empty beach under a bright sun, with a modern glass resort hotel rising behind tropical greenery to the right and turquoise waters to the left. As the character turns left to face the sea, the resort buildings gradually recede and exit the frame, opening the view to the horizon. The scene then expands as the camera moves toward a pier that grows larger in the center of the frame, finally revealing a distant cargo ship appearing on the horizon.
